Greytrix Business Solutions Pvt. Ltd. - Prospect

1. He want again a demo with someone, than he will purchase, on 8 he will be meeting I will call him Friday.
  2. Now He is telling wanted to onboard himself, but other directors are not allowing quickly, and saying first finish the maxican project than move with this dearERP plan, so he told me once i will get the permission i will call you, either you can check by calling in 2 weeks.
